Y.name: Playbook Skill SubAgent Wiring
Y.description: Wire SubAgentManager into ExecuteSkillTool so PLAYBOOK skills (docx etc.) can spawn SubAgent in TUI/CLI

phase_name: Phase Y — Playbook Skill SubAgent Wiring
key_decisions: Introduced SubAgentContext struct to avoid circular dependency (AgentLoopConfig contains tools, tools contain ExecuteSkillTool which needs config)
SubAgentContext holds provider/tools/model/user_id/sandbox_id/tool_ctx — all fields ExecuteSkillTool.execute_playbook() needs
executor.rs creates SubAgentManager(max_concurrent=4, max_depth=3) per turn and injects into tools snapshot
Removed 2 pre-existing broken legacy db tests from test_octo_root.rs
SubAgent max_iterations raised from 10 to 30 (configurable per skill via max-rounds field)
Added execute_skill to TUI tool registry to display skill name in UI

deferred.description: octo root migrate — auto-migrate legacy DB locations to new OctoRoot layout
deferred.precondition: When users need automated migration from legacy paths
When multi-project config management is needed

deferred.description: Dependency graph topo-sort wiring — no builtin skills use dependencies currently
deferred.precondition: When skills with inter-dependencies are added

notes: Phase Y complete. SubAgentContext wiring enables PLAYBOOK skill execution (docx, pptx, etc.) in TUI/CLI. max_rounds configurable per skill. TUI now shows skill name in tool call display.
